parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
={{
"╔════════════════════════════════════╗\n" +
"        🌍 **CONVERSOR GLOBAL DE DIVISAS** 🌍\n" +
"╚════════════════════════════════════╝\n\n" +

"🇨🇴 **Valor base:** **1.000 Pesos Colombianos (COP)**\n\n" +

"💵 **AMÉRICA**\n" +
"🇺🇸 Estados Unidos (USD): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.USD).toFixed(4) + "** USD\n" +
"🇨🇦 Canadá (CAD): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CAD).toFixed(4) + "** CAD\n" +
"🇲🇽 México (MXN): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.MXN).toFixed(4) + "** MXN\n" +
"🇧🇷 Brasil (BRL): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.BRL).toFixed(4) + "** BRL\n" +
"🇦🇷 Argentina (ARS): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.ARS).toFixed(2) + "** ARS\n" +
"🇨🇱 Chile (CLP): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CLP).toFixed(2) + "** CLP\n" +
"🇵🇪 Perú (PEN): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.PEN).toFixed(4) + "** PEN\n\n" +

"🌍 **EUROPA**\n" +
"🇪🇺 Euro (EUR): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.EUR).toFixed(4) + "** EUR\n" +
"🇬🇧 Reino Unido (GBP): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.GBP).toFixed(4) + "** GBP\n" +
"🇨🇭 Suiza (CHF): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CHF).toFixed(4) + "** CHF\n\n" +

"🌏 **ASIA**\n" +
"🇯🇵 Japón (JPY): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.JPY).toFixed(2) + "** JPY\n" +
"🇨🇳 China (CNY): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CNY).toFixed(4) + "** CNY\n" +
"🇰🇷 Corea del Sur (KRW): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.KRW).toFixed(2) + "** KRW\n" +
"🇮🇳 India (INR): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.INR).toFixed(2) + "** INR\n\n" +

"🌏 **OCEANÍA**\n" +
"🇦🇺 Australia (AUD): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.AUD).toFixed(4) + "** AUD\n" +
"🇳🇿 Nueva Zelanda (NZD): **" + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.NZD).toFixed(4) + "** NZD\n\n" +

"━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n" +
"📅 **INFORMACIÓN**\n\n" +
"📊 **Tasas actualizadas:** " +
new Date($node['HTTP Request'].json.time_last_update_unix * 1000).toLocaleString('es-CO', {
  timeZone: 'America/Bogota',
  weekday: 'long',
  year: 'numeric',
  month: 'long',
  day: 'numeric',
  hour: '2-digit',
  minute: '2-digit'
}) + "\n\n" +

"📨 **Mensaje enviado:** " +
new Date().toLocaleString('es-CO', {
  timeZone: 'America/Bogota',
  weekday: 'long',
  year: 'numeric',
  month: 'long',
  day: 'numeric',
  hour: '2-digit',
  minute: '2-digit'
}) + "\n\n" +

"━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n" +
"🤖 **Automatizado con n8n**"
}}

parameters.value:
={{

"🇨🇴 *Valor base:* *1.000 Pesos Colombianos (COP)*\n\n" +

"🇺🇸 Estados Unidos (USD): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.USD).toFixed(4) + " USD\n" +

"🇲🇽 México (MXN): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.MXN).toFixed(4) + " MXN\n" +
"🇧🇷 Brasil (BRL): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.BRL).toFixed(4) + " BRL\n" +
"🇦🇷 Argentina (ARS): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.ARS).toFixed(2) + " ARS\n" +
"🇨🇱 Chile (CLP): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CLP).toFixed(2) + " CLP\n" +
"🇵🇪 Perú (PEN): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.PEN).toFixed(4) + " PEN\n\n" +

"🌍 *EUROPA*\n" +
"🇪🇺 Euro (EUR): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.EUR).toFixed(4) + " EUR\n" +
"🇬🇧 Reino Unido (GBP): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.GBP).toFixed(4) + " GBP\n" +
"🇨🇭 Suiza (CHF): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CHF).toFixed(4) + " CHF\n\n" +

"🌏 *ASIA*\n" +
"🇯🇵 Japón (JPY): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.JPY).toFixed(2) + " JPY\n" +
"🇨🇳 China (CNY): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CNY).toFixed(4) + " CNY\n" +
"🇰🇷 Corea del Sur (KRW): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.KRW).toFixed(2) + " KRW\n" +
"🇮🇳 India (INR): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.INR).toFixed(2) + " INR\n\n" +

"🌏 *OCEANÍA*\n" +
"🇦🇺 Australia (AUD): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.AUD).toFixed(4) + " AUD\n" +
"🇳🇿 Nueva Zelanda (NZD): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.NZD).toFixed(4) + " NZD\n\n" +

"━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n" +

"📅 *INFORMACIÓN*\n\n" +

"📊 Tasas actualizadas:\n" +
new Date($node['HTTP Request'].json.time_last_update_unix * 1000).toLocaleString('es-CO',{
timeZone:'America/Bogota',
weekday:'long',
year:'numeric',
month:'long',
day:'numeric',
hour:'2-digit',
minute:'2-digit'
}) +

"\n\n📨 Mensaje enviado:\n" +

new Date().toLocaleString('es-CO',{
timeZone:'America/Bogota',
weekday:'long',
year:'numeric',
month:'long',
day:'numeric',
hour:'2-digit',
minute:'2-digit'
}) +

"\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n" +

"🤖 Automatizado con n8n\n" +
" Desarrollado por Sebastián F y Heiling."
}}

" +  "🇨🇴 *Valor base:* *1.000 Pesos Colombianos (COP)*

" +  "💵 *AMÉRICA*

" + "🇲🇽 México (MXN): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.MXN).toFixed(4) + " MXN

" + "🇨🇱 Chile (CLP): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CLP).toFixed(2) + " CLP
" + "🇵🇪 Perú (PEN): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.PEN).toFixed(4) + " PEN

" +  "🌍 *EUROPA*

" + "🇬🇧 Reino Unido (GBP): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.GBP).toFixed(4) + " GBP
" + "🇨🇭 Suiza (CHF): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CHF).toFixed(4) + " CHF

" +  "🌏 *ASIA*
" + "🇯🇵 Japón (JPY): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.JPY).toFixed(2) + " JPY
" + "🇨🇳 China (CNY): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.CNY).toFixed(4) + " CNY
" + "🇰🇷 Corea del Sur (KRW): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.KRW).toFixed(2) + " KRW
" + "🇮🇳 India (INR): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.INR).toFixed(2) + " INR

" +  "🌏 *OCEANÍA*
" + "🇦🇺 Australia (AUD): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.AUD).toFixed(4) + " AUD
" + "🇳🇿 Nueva Zelanda (NZD): " + ((1000/$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.COP)*$node['HTTP Request'].json.conversion_rates.NZD).toFixed(4) + " NZD

" +  "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
" +  "📅 *INFORMACIÓN*

" +  "📊 Tasas actualizadas:
" + new Date($node['HTTP Request'].json.time_last_update_unix * 1000).toLocaleString('es-CO',{ timeZone:'America/Bogota', weekday:'long', year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' }) +  "

📨 Mensaje enviado:
" +  new Date().toLocaleString('es-CO',{ timeZone:'America/Bogota', weekday:'long', year:'numeric', month:'long', day:'numeric', hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit' }) +  "

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
" +  "🤖 Automatizado con n8n
" + " Desarrollado por Sebastián F y Heiling." }}
